_comment: CamSim default configuration. All values can be overridden via environment variables.
_comment_entity: camera_entity_id: CIGI entity ID that controls the camera. All others are scene entities.
_comment_gimbal: Gimbal parameters. slew_rate: max °/s (0=snap). pitch/yaw min/max: physical axis limits in degrees.
_comment_sensor_fov: sensor_fov_presets: ordered wide→narrow FOV values (degrees) mapped from Sensor Control Gain (0.0=wide, 1.0=narrow). Empty array = ignore Gain, use ViewDef FOV only.
_comment_sensor_modes: sensor_modes: per-waveband CPU-side post-processing parameters. SensorId 0=EO, 1=IR, 2=NVG.
_comment_types: entity_types: maps CIGI EntityType uint16 to asset paths. Use .gltf/.glb paths (relative to entities/) for runtime loading, or /Game/... UE content paths for cooked assets. 'scale' is a uniform scale factor (default 1.0). 'rotation' is a pitch/yaw/roll offset in degrees applied to the mesh component to correct model-space orientation.
